Lorea & Amy's Recipes
  • List

Lasagna Soup

Preparation time 0m
Cook time 30m
Ingredients
  • 1 lb ground beef
  • 1/2 tbsp Italian seasoning
  • 4 cups beef broth
  • 2 650 ml jars marinara sauce
  • 1 lb mafalda or cavatappi pasta
  • 1/2 cup heavy cream
  • 1 cup mozzarella
Instructions
  1. Brown ground beef in a 5 qt. stock pot over medium high heat. Drain and season.
  2. Add both jars of sauce and broth to pot. Head over medium heat until simmering.
  3. Add pasta and simmer on low for 20 minutes, or until pasta is cooked through.
  4. Remove from heat and mix in heavy cream. Fold in cheese and serve topped with additional cheese, if desired.
